title: viola × teresiana
intro: Viola × teresiana, also known as the hybrid pansy or viola, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the garden violet (Viola x hybrida). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Viola × teresiana include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of menopause and PMS. In herbal preparations, Viola × teresiana can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to create a calming and soothing effect.
